title: Lock v0.2 differentiation plan
reason: Update ni's own locked planning contract to reflect the post-053 v0.2 differentiation direction.
proposed_changes: Record the Project Intent Compiler positioning and Intent Lock Protocol mechanism in the active plan.
Add the v0.2 proof assets as accepted differentiation scope.
Keep the proof assets pre-runtime and explicitly outside execution harness behavior.
risk_impact: Adds RISK-012 to prevent proof assets from drifting into runtime execution claims.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY after docs and contract sync because the new capability has linked requirement, evaluation, risk mitigation, and artifacts.
